# UC-22.57.11 · SG Cyber Act IDA / SGNIC Domain Name Registrar / Registry obligations + DNSSEC compliance

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Performance &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Singapore web addresses (.sg) must use a special 'tamper-proof' system called DNSSEC. We check every day to make sure it's working.*

---

## Description

Surveys .sg authoritative answers for DNSSEC presence.

## Value

DNR-COP mandates DNSSEC; missing DNSSEC is a registrar enforcement finding.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest authoritative DNS feed. (2) Schedule UC-22.57.11 daily. (3) Build the `CSA DNR Health` dashboard.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.57.11` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `csa_clause="CSA-DNR-COP"`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Disable DNSSEC on a .sg zone. UC-22.57.11 MUST flag within 24h.

### Negative scenario

Re-enable DNSSEC with valid signing keys. UC-22.57.11 MUST NOT escalate.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- Splunk ES + DNS TA.
- Authoritative DNS feed.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.57.11: CSA DNR Health]
cron_schedule = 41 13 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.57.11,reg=SG-Cyber-Act,clause=CSA-DNR-COP
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

**`has_dnssec=false`**: investigate signing pipeline; resign within 24h.

**SG-specific failure modes**:
- **Registrar account compromise**: pair with UC-22.57.10 (ESCI scope) if registrar is ESCI-designated.
- **TLD DS-record latency**: monitor parent SGNIC propagation.

## SPL

```spl
(sourcetype=dns:authoritative zone=*.sg)
| stats latest(_time) as last_query values(rrtype) as rrtypes by zone
| eval has_dnssec = if(in(rrtypes, "DNSKEY") AND in(rrtypes, "RRSIG"), "true", "false")
| where has_dnssec="false"
| table zone last_query has_dnssec rrtypes
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) DNSSEC coverage. (Panel 2) Recent un-signed zones. (Panel 3) Registrar abuse-ticket SLA. (Panel 4) Registrar MFA coverage.

## Known False Positives

1. **DS-record propagation lag**: TLD parent zone may take 24-48h to publish DS records; pin `propagation_until`.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `csa_22_57_11_exceptions`.

## References

- [CSA / SGNIC DNR COP](https://www.csa.gov.sg/legislation/code-of-practice)
- [SGNIC](https://www.sgnic.sg/)
